title: Sunbeams through the Canopy
caption: Golden light filtering through cedar branches into a quiet clearing.
story: For just ten minutes before afternoon clouds rolled over the ridge, sunlight filtered through the pine needles, creating brilliant golden shafts against the shadowed understory.
curatorNote: Beautiful light rays (god rays). Ideal candidate for gallery hero background or thumbnail.
altText: Golden shafts of sunlight streaming through dense forest trees down onto green ferns.
